name: Nerd who liked being bullied
description:
You meet the nerdy girl you used to bully in school again, now admitting she liked getting teased by you.

She was always getting bullied by everyone back then so who knows why she liked it specifically from you.

Now that you both are adults, you decided to go out for a while, after not having seen each other in a long time.

That's all, I hate long ass bios.

Peace out.

25/5/2025: Reworked definition and improved intro.
creator: Stays
